allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['product']; print\('TITLE:',d['title']\); print\('HANDLE:',d['handle']\); print\('ID:',d['id']\); [print\(v['id'], '|', v['title'], '|', v.get\('option1'\), '|', 'available=',v['available']\) for v in d['variants']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('TITLE:',d['title']\); print\('OPTIONS:',d['options']\); print\('---'\); [print\(v['id'],'|',repr\(v['title']\),'|','available=',v['available'],'|','opt1=',v.get\('option1'\)\) for v in d['variants']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('TITLE:',d['title']\); [print\(' ',v['option1'],'-> available=',v['available']\) for v in d['variants']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OPTIONS:',json.dumps\(d['options'],indent=1\)\); v=d['variants'][0]; print\('SAMPLE VARIANT opt1/2/3:',repr\(v.get\('option1'\)\),repr\(v.get\('option2'\)\),repr\(v.get\('option3'\)\)\)")
Bash(FILTER_BRANCH_SQUELCH_WARNING=1 git filter-branch --force --index-filter 'git rm --cached --ignore-unmatch frontend/.env backend/.env' --prune-empty HEAD)
